> >Description:
> When DMA enabled ,my machine fails to read ata disk with dma mode on
> startup, and fallback to PIO mode.
> After falling back to PIO mode, the machine works fine .
> 
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Boot with ATA-DMA enabled KERNEL.
>

>
